settings.badge_text: BACKED BY SCIENCE · FREE COURSE INCLUDED
settings.subheading: The FrameFix Strap™ retrains your body into proper alignment — improving how your jawline looks, how tall you appear, and how confidently you carry yourself.

settings.heading: Your Posture Is Holding You Back
settings.bottom_text: The good news? This is completely fixable.

settings.title: Forward Head Posture
settings.description: Pushes your head forward, compressing the tissue under your chin. Your jawline appears less defined — not because of fat or genetics, but positioning.

settings.title: Slouched Shoulders
settings.description: Makes you look shorter, less confident, and closed off. Over time it weakens your upper back and locks your body into this position.

settings.title: Weak Frame
settings.description: Poor posture signals low energy before you say a word. Your ‘frame’ — how you fill space — starts with how you stand.

settings.short_description: Retrains your posture. Sharpens your jawline appearance. Builds a stronger frame. Includes the full Posture Mastery Course free.
settings.size_note: Runs small — we recommend sizing up. This product is unisex.

Discreet — wear under or over clothing

settings.heading: Why It Works
settings.subheading: Grounded in real research. Here’s what science says about posture.

settings.title: Jawline & Appearance
settings.description: Forward head posture compresses tissue under the chin, making the jawline appear less defined. Proper alignment visibly sharpens your profile.

settings.title: Confidence & Perception
settings.description: Upright posture is linked to higher confidence, stronger first impressions, and better mood.

settings.title: Energy & Performance
settings.description: Poor posture reduces lung capacity and increases fatigue. Correcting it improves breathing and energy.
settings.source: Mayo Clinic; Journal of Physical Therapy Science

settings.heading: Included Free With Every Order

settings.title: What Goes Wrong
settings.subtitle: Forward head posture, Upper Crossed Syndrome

settings.title: Put it on
settings.description: Wear it like a backpack. Adjust the straps until it's snug but comfortable.

settings.title: Train your body
settings.description: The strap gently holds your shoulders back. Your muscles learn correct alignment over time.

settings.title: See the change
settings.description: Within weeks, your posture improves. Your frame, jawline appearance, and confidence follow.

settings.question: How long should I wear it each day?
settings.answer: Start with 15-30 minutes in your first week. Gradually increase to 1-2 hours. The included Posture Course has a detailed 4-week plan.

settings.question: Will this improve my jawline?
settings.answer: Posture affects how your jawline appears by changing head and neck positioning. It won't change bone structure, but proper alignment can significantly sharpen how your features look.

settings.question: Can I wear it under my clothes?
settings.answer: Yes. The FrameFix Strap is slim and lightweight enough to wear discreetly under most shirts.

settings.question: How quickly will I see results?
settings.answer: Most people notice a difference in how they carry themselves within the first week. Visible, lasting change typically takes 2-4 weeks of consistent use with the exercises in the included course.

settings.question: What size should I order?
settings.answer: S: chest 70-86 cm / M: 86-96 cm / L: 96-107 cm / XL: 107-122 cm. The strap runs small and is unisex — we recommend sizing up if you're between sizes.

settings.question: Is there a money-back guarantee?
settings.answer: Yes. Full 30-day money-back guarantee. If you're not satisfied, contact us for a hassle-free refund.

settings.question: What's included in my order?
settings.answer: You receive the FrameFix Strap™ and the full Posture Mastery Course (a digital PDF sent to your email after purchase).

settings.heading: Your Frame Starts Here
settings.subheading: FrameFix Strap™ + Posture Course. Stand taller, look sharper, carry yourself with confidence.
